response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 16+ years of experience and proven expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Currently working on exactly this technology combination at re:cinq with additional AI-agent infrastructure expertise that exceeds the job requirements. Primary gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js and specific testing framework mentions (Vitest/Playwright), but the depth of Node.js and testing culture suggest rapid framework adoption. Overall, a senior-level candidate well-positioned for the role.
strengths: 16+ years fullstack experience with demonstrated expertise in all primary stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) at current and recent roles, including AWS CDK and cloud platform work
Current experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development at re:cinq, directly exceeding the stated AI agent development requirement

Staff-level experience with strong architecture and system design demonstrated through open-source GISCollective platform on Kubernetes, plus deep testing culture evidenced by TDD practices, testing library contributions, and teaching workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience mentioned; background shows Node.js/general backend but not the specific framework listed in primary stack
Specific testing tools (Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly called out despite strong TDD and testing culture background across career
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned in skills; experience shown with MySQL and general SQL but relational database variety not detailed

key_factors.factor: Current stack expertise (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS)
